violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator have an accumulation of food. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Facility had been using hand sanitizer. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The hand-washing sink in the toilet rooms were lacking proper signage. A sign or poster that notifies FOOD EMPLOYEES to wash their hands shall be provided at all HANDWASHING SINKS used by FOODEMPLOYEES and shall be clearly visible to FOOD EMPLOYEES. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storage closet. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

The floors especially behind the stove have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024
